justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's time preferences, even when the user was flexible around a specific time.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly reported unavailability without offering concrete alternative dates or times, instead asking the user to provide new preferences.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple redundant API calls for both in-branch and online appointments, checking the same dates and times repeatedly.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was frustrating due to the agent's inability to find any appointments and its repetitive responses, leading to a dead-end conversation.

overall_notes: The agent struggled significantly with finding any available appointments, both in-branch and online, which led to a very unproductive and frustrating conversation for the user.
